functions.name: create-inspection
functions.description: Creates a new inspection record. Only claimNumber is required. ID is auto-generated, status defaults to 'open'. claimId is optional.

functions.name: get-claim-summary
functions.description: Returns a text summary for a specific claim with key details. Use claim ID or claim number.

functions.name: list-inspectors
functions.description: Lists all available inspectors with their specializations.

functions.name: show-claim-detail
functions.description: Displays detailed information about a specific insurance claim including related inspections, purchase orders, and contractor assignments. Use claim ID (e.g. '1', '2') or claim number (e.g. 'CN202504990').

functions.name: show-claims-dashboard
functions.description: Displays the Zava Insurance claims dashboard showing all claims with status overview, filters, and summary metrics. Supports filtering by status and/or policy holder name. When the user mentions a person's name, first name, last name, or partial name, always pass it as the policyHolderName parameter. The name filter is case-insensitive and supports partial matches.

functions.name: show-contractors
functions.description: Displays the list of contractors available for insurance repair work. Optionally filter by specialty or preferred status.

functions.name: update-claim-status
functions.description: Updates the status of an insurance claim. Use claim ID (e.g. '1', '2').

functions.name: update-inspection
functions.description: Updates an inspection record — status, findings, recommended actions, property, or inspector assignment.

functions.name: update-purchase-order
functions.description: Updates a purchase order status (e.g. approve, reject, complete).
